_comment: P100 vLLM model catalogue. 4x 16 GB HBM2 (64 GB total). FP16 ONLY — no compressed-tensors/AWQ/GPTQ (requires CC>=7.0), no MoE (kernel issues on Pascal). Dense FP16 models only.

meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct._note: FP16 ~15 GB weights. Confirmed working on P100.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct._note: FP16 ~14 GB weights. Comfortable on TP1.

Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B._note: FP16 ~18 GB weights. Needs TP2 minimum.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct._note: FP16 ~28 GB weights. Needs TP2, comfortable on TP4.

Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct._note: FP16 ~64 GB weights. Needs all 4 GPUs. Very tight fit.
